reviews.review_description: I don't have any friends yet to play with and I found myself playing the computer and not being social on it as I would like. No universal avatar import protocol on these things yet. I want to look like me. Otherwise great graphics and no real other complaints.
Really good...looking forward to any updates...G

I was waiting for this game so long
But I hope the game well become more harder in next updates
I like the room and the board, but the AI is really weak. This could be really fun in the future, but right now it's just a demo.

developer_response.body: Yep, that's why we're in Gallery Apps! Improving the AI is very much a part of the plan and we should have something to really challenge you shortly. :)

reviews.review_description: Very nice, cant wait for multiplayer.

I really like the environments and the ap overall.  I do wish there was a  beginners option for those learning to play chess that gives pointers, a few instructions, rules, etc. 
Also it would be nice to be able to save your game for the next time you play so you can continue the same game next time.

developer_response.body:
Hi Simply,

I've got good news -- both of those features are on the roadmap. We'll probably get save and continue in there before the tutorial, but we are definitely working on all of that functionality!

reviews.review_description: Great game!  Only problem I have is how far down you have to look to grab your pieces.  Could use a little adjusting.  Other than that, I really enjoy it!

developer_response.body: Hi tattoo1217, have you tried changing the seat height in the Magic Table menu (the top tab on the left of the UI)? I personally like the second one from the bottom for the reason you just mentioned. Maybe that would help you too?

reviews.review_description: Why can't you castle? I have a defensive strategy I use and I have to castle!

developer_response.body: Hi Hollow847 -- You actually can castle! Just select the position that you want the king to be in AFTER the castle and he will slide right over. The only situations in which you can't castle are the same as those you'd encounter in a typical chess match: you can't castle through or into check. Try it now!

reviews.review_description: Come on guys, why isn't this installable to the SD card? It's 2018!!

excellent ai and gorgeous background 
so fun to play it is better on the rift 
praise Jesus
Very good game. Graphics is good. But only  gear vr controller's button is work. Gear vr controller must be full work!
Love playing chess great game add me if you want to play together jimmyquick
Cool graphics

Verrry good ... 
We feel confortable ... good view ... 
but why we cant use the remote of samsung VR ... 
i ll give 5 stars if we can use it. It is really difficult to move without it.

developer_response.body:
Hello Prifoued. Glad that you like our game!
Sorry to hear you're having issues with the remote. The game is definitely configured to use the remote (we all use it when playing) - if you're having trouble with it, try asking about it in our Discord/QA channel here: https://discord.gg/A8WpAKq

reviews.review_description: Not very impressed by the surroundings, but the chess game looks good. Will I play a full match in VR for hours? I'm quite sure I wouldn't. So this was just a five minute curiosity to me.
Pretty cool. But why I can't live stream on Facebook during playing this game. I wish I can show this awesome game to my friends..
great game but want to play me mates on it. will be 5 stars when updated to multi player

developer_response.body: Hey Jackalkarl - We've updated the game to improve multiplayer...and by the time you're reading this, voice chat should be live as well. Hope you still enjoy playing and keep passing on your suggestions!

reviews.review_description: Its a free chess app in VR, which is great. It's obviously early days - yes it needs a new AI, and so many other things, I may be missing something but I couldn't even figure out how to play black? What I want most of all though is positional tracking to give the feel of actually sitting at a chess board.
This is great for real! The only thing I'm waiting is that I can play with random people since I don't have friends that play this...  add me if you want! Lets play!

reviews.review_title: Very nice app but needs more options.
reviews.review_description: Very nice app but needs more options.

developer_response.body:
Hi Ursus_Arctos,

Thanks for reaching out and for your review! We have a long backlog of improvements we want to make to Magic Table Chess. If you have anything you'd like to see specifically, please feel free to reach out via our website or social media.

Thanks,

Producer Coray
